afterSnapshot.name: BEST_WINDOW_HORIZON_HOURS
afterSnapshot.description: How many forecast hours ahead to search for the calmest sailing window.

context.userMessage: Approved — go ahead and build it. Run the tests and type checks to verify nothing is broken, and show me what changed.

rationale: Avoid a magic number and make the search horizon tunable.
implementation: Stored as app config; the algorithm clamps it to the available hourly data length.
